synthesis.summary: Workflow tedium dominates the qualitative signal.

themes.title: Tedium
themes.description: Repeated manual steps slow every panelist down.

themes.title: Speed expectations
themes.description: Panelists expect sub-second feedback for common actions.

agreements.title: Manual steps
agreements.description: All panelists call out the same three manual steps as redundant.

disagreements.text: Whether to fix UX first or rebuild the data model first.

synthesis.recommendation: Cut the three redundant steps in the next sprint; defer the data-model debate.
